metadata.title: UK Public Finances — Receipts, Spending & Borrowing Flow
metadata.description: How government receipts flow into spending categories, debt interest, and borrowing.

limitations: Spending category breakdown uses OBR proportional shares applied to ONS total TME. Monthly category splits are not published.
Tax receipt breakdown uses ONS individual tax CDIDs. Residuals calculated as balancing items.

_ingest.sourceName: ONS Public Sector Finances (time series CDIDs)
